title: FA Workflow
author: Opentrons
materials: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: This is a flexible normalization protocol...
steps.instruction: This is a flexible normalization protocol a 2-fold dilution to an input desired concentration followed by sample aliquoting in triplicate. Normalization parameters should be input as a .csv file below, and should be formatted as shown in the following template **including headers line**: ``` sample number,sample name,sample concentration (>0.25 mg/ml) 1,007007009-403-1,1.569 2,007007009-403-2,0.984 3,007007009-403-3,2.128 4,007007009-403-4,2.413 5,007007009-403-5,2.303 6,007007009-403-6,1.541 7,007007009-403-7,2.404 8,007007009-403-8,2.352 9,007007009-403-9,2.763 10,007007009-403-10,1.763 11,007007009-403-11,2.094 12,007007009-403-12,0.906 13,007007009-403-13,0.715 ``` You can also access this template for download [here](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/4568fa/ex.csv) ---

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
